mapper.sql: id, account_id, name, description, code, parameters, strategy_type, status, initial_capital, benchmark, start_date, end_date, frequency, jq_strategy_id, jq_backtest_id, last_run_time, last_error, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_quant_strategy (id, account_id, name, description, code, parameters, strategy_type, status, initial_capital, benchmark, start_date, end_date, frequency, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{accountId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{code}, #{parameters}, #{strategyType}, #{status}, #{initialCapital}, #{benchmark}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{frequency}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_quant_strategy SET status = #{status}, last_run_time = #{lastRunTime}, last_error = #{lastError}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_quant_strategy SET jq_strategy_id = #{jqStrategyId}, jq_backtest_id = #{jqBacktestId}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
